heading: Character of gain or loss on contributed unrealized receivables, inventory items, and capital loss property
label: 724 Character of gain or loss on contributed unrealized receivables, inventory items, and capital loss property
notes: Amendments1997—Subsec. (d)(2). substituted “section 751(d)” for “section 751(d)(2)”.Pub. L. 105–341996—Subsec. (d)(3)(B). substituted “Subparagraph” for “Subparagaph”.Pub. L. 104–188

children.text: was contributed to the partnership by a partner, and
was an unrealized receivable in the hands of such partner immediately before such contribution,
was contributed to the partnership by a partner, and
was an inventory item in the hands of such partner immediately before such contribution,

children.heading: Contributions of capital loss property
children.label: c Contributions of capital loss property

children.text: was contributed by a partner to the partnership, and
was a capital asset in the hands of such partner immediately before such contribution,

children.heading: Unrealized receivable
children.label: 1 Unrealized receivable
children.text: The term “unrealized receivable” has the meaning given such term by section 751(c) (determined by treating any reference to the partnership as referring to the partner).

children.heading: Inventory item
children.label: 2 Inventory item
children.text: The term “inventory item” has the meaning given such term by section 751(d) (determined by treating any reference to the partnership as referring to the partner and by applying section 1231 without regard to any holding period therein provided).

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: If any property described in subsection (a), (b), or (c) is disposed of in a nonrecognition transaction, the tax treatment which applies to such property under such subsection shall also apply to any substituted basis property resulting from such transaction. A similar rule shall also apply in the case of a series of non-recognition transactions.

children.heading: Exception for stock in C corporation
children.label: B Exception for stock in C corporation
children.text: Subparagraph (A) shall not apply to any stock in a C corporation received in an exchange described in section 351.
